name: Real Old Fashioned Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pitcher, combine the juice from 6 lemons and the sugar; stir until the sugar is completely dissolved.
2. Add the remaining ingredients: 4 cups of cold water and the sliced lemon.
3. Stir well to ensure all components are thoroughly mixed.
4. Serve over ice cubes for 4-6 people.
